nasb.text: For they also built for themselves high places and sacred pillars and Asherim on every high hill and beneath every luxuriant tree.

esv.text: For they also built for themselves high places and pillars and Asherim on every high hill and under every green tree,

cnv.text: 他們又為自己在各高岡上，各茂盛樹下建造邱壇、神柱和亞舍拉。

ccb.text: 他们在各高岗上、树荫下为自己建造丘坛，竖立神柱和亚舍拉神像，
